category_title: Elementary students with ASD experiencing emotional outbursts and academic refusal during family transitions
scenario_title: Emotional outbursts during school arrivals and departures
minimal_context: Gabriel is packing up his belongings at the end of the day to depart from Apple Elementary.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Gabriel, it is time to pack up your backpack and get ready to depart from school.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Me, my mom, and my dad use to live in one house.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's look at your calendar to see your transportation for today.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: My parents do not live together anymore. My parents are divorced. I live in two houses. My parents live in two different houses.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, please get your coat so we can go.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Starts crying loudly and pushes his backpack onto the floor) No! I am not going!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Gabriel, it is time to pack up your backpack and get ready to depart from school.

STUDENT: Me, my mom, and my dad use to live in one house.

TUTOR: Let's look at your calendar to see your transportation for today.

STUDENT: My parents do not live together anymore. My parents are divorced. I live in two houses. My parents live in two different houses.

TUTOR: Okay, please get your coat so we can go.

STUDENT: (Starts crying loudly and pushes his backpack onto the floor) No! I am not going!

task.content: arriving to and departing from school
task.learning_goal: successful transitions to and from school and his two homes

context.environment: Apple Elementary, a large public elementary school
context.materials: calendar for him that listed his daily transportation, after-school care, and nightly sleeping location
context.time_context: arriving to and departing from school

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: schedule, which had changed since the divorce
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: sensitive to disrupted family routines, due to the rigidity often associated with the disorder and challenges with transitions
related_quotes: My parents do not live together anymore. My parents are divorced. I live in two houses. My parents live in two different houses.

behavior_patterns.condition: arriving to and departing from school
related_quotes: Me, my mom, and my dad use to live in one house.
